'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 44''' was the forty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 30]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]]
*[[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]]
*[[FLR-series Logger Droid|FLR Logger]]
*[[CR-2 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Naboo Security CR-2 Blaster]]
*[[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]]
